title: Void's Book Enchant Overlay
description: changes enchanted book textures depending on enchantment and level
body:
**Cit Resewn Required!**

changes enchanted books' ribbons and pins depending on enchant and level saving you from the pain of looking for that one book in a chess full of enchant books while also keeping the vanilla feel.

enchantments and their respective ribbons (single level enchants don't have pins):  

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**_General and curses:_**                     
Unbreaking - Green               
Mending - Green                
Curse of Vanishing - Dark Red, Black Book                     
Curse of Binding - Dark Red, Black Book                            

**_Armor:_**                  
Protection - Light Blue                 
Blast Protection - Purple             
Fire Protection - Orange                  
Projectile Protection - Yellow                    
Feather Falling - White                
Soul Speed - Cyan             
Frost Walker - Blue              
Depth Strider - Blue                   
Respiration - Blue                  
Aqua Affinity - Blue              
Swift Sneak - Cyan               

**_Sword:_**                        
Sharpness - White                
Smite - Dark Green                 
Bane of Arthropods - Dark Grey                  
Sweeping Edge - White              
Looting - Lime                  
Fire Aspect - Orange                  
Knockkback - Dark Blue                             
                 
**_Tool:_**                    
Efficiency - Red                       
Fortune - Lime              
Silk Touch - Purple             

**_Bow:_**               
Power - Yellow                  
Punch - Dark Blue                    
Flame - Orange                            
Infinity - Purple                

**_Crossbow:_**                  
Quick Charge - Red               
Piercing - Yellow                
Multishot - Purple             

**_Trident:_**                      
Impaling - White               
Loyalty - Light Blue              
Channeling - Yellow               
Riptide - Blue           

**_Mace:_**                 
Density - Dark Grey                    
Breach - Light Blue               
Wind Burst - White  
                  
**_Fishing Rod:_**                         
Lure - Blue                    
Luch of the Sea - Lime                                

</details>
